docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY GODFREY,DAVID B.DBA CALIFORNIA BUSINESS ASSOCIATES AS TO DEFENDANT NUNEZ, MARIETTA SOLIS, ALBERTO ASSIER, JEAN MARIE PLMLL CORPORATION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-19-1997 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT C

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GODFREY,DAVID B.DBA CALIFORNIA BUSINESS ASSOCIATES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NUNEZ, MARIETTA SOLIS, ALBERTO ASSIER, JEAN MARIE PLMLL CORPORATION $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,050.00, PROOF OF SERVICE WAIVED STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT TO ALBERTO SOLIS REMAILED TO HIS NEW ADDRESS. 2340 GOLDEN GATE AVE. S.F. 94118.
